final:
module aes_encrypt(
    input wire [7:0] plaintext,
    input wire [7:0] key,
    output reg [7:0] ciphertext,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            ciphertext <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            ciphertext <= plaintext ^ key; // Simple XOR operation for encryption
        end
    end
endmodule
